top_ore_stack_count: How many visible stacks have {counted_resource_name} as the top cube?
Count the stacks whose top cube is {counted_resource_name}.
Report the number of cube stacks with {counted_resource_name} on top.
Among the visible stacks, how many show {counted_resource_name} as their top cube?
How many stacks have a top cube of {counted_resource_name}?
resource_route_cost: {minecraft_route_cost_rule_text} How many raised blocks are on the track?
Count the raised stone or dirt blocks sitting on the visible track.
{minecraft_route_cost_rule_text} How many raised blocks are on that track?
Along the visible track, how many stone or dirt blocks are raised?
How many raised stone or dirt blocks lie on the shown track?
exact_height_count: How many visible cube stacks are exactly {target_stack_height} cubes tall?
Count the visible stacks that are exactly {target_stack_height} cubes tall.
Report the number of cube stacks with height exactly {target_stack_height} cubes.
Among the visible stacks, how many are exactly {target_stack_height} cubes tall?
How many stacks have exactly {target_stack_height} cubes?
at_least_height_count: How many visible cube stacks are at least {target_stack_height} cubes tall?
Count the visible stacks that are at least {target_stack_height} cubes tall.
Report the number of cube stacks with height at least {target_stack_height} cubes.
Among the visible stacks, how many are at least {target_stack_height} cubes tall?
How many stacks have height at least {target_stack_height} cubes?

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_block_world: a Minecraft-like isometric block world with cube terrain, visible cube stacks or raised blocks, and any marked track needed for the question
code_prompt_defaults.minecraft_route_cost_rule_text: Each raised stone or dirt block sitting on the visible track counts 1; empty track cells and raised blocks away from the track count 0.
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_top_ore_stack_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one around each visible stack whose top cube is the named ore
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_top_ore_stack_count: set "answer" to the integer number of stacks whose top cube is the named ore
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_resource_route_cost: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one around each raised stone or dirt block on the visible track; use an empty array if the count is 0
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_resource_route_cost: set "answer" to the integer number of raised blocks on the track
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_exact_height_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one around each visible stack that is exactly the named height
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_exact_height_count: set "answer" to the integer number of stacks that are exactly the named height
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_at_least_height_count: set "annotation" to bounding boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1], one around each visible stack that is at least the named height
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_at_least_height_count: set "answer" to the integer number of stacks that are at least the named height
